methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Seed → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.5x) to $142M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Biotech & Health (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 16 same-sector peers exist in Biotech & Health, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Biotech & Health P/S median is 7.4x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

data.narrative:
EvolutionaryScale is a seed-stage biotech company founded by Alexander Rives, Tom Sercu, and Salvatore Candido that has raised $142M to date. The valuation analysis draws on a broader Biotech & Health sector universe of 3 public comparables (RXRX, TEM, ONT.L) and 8 private peers including Tempus AI, Abridge, and Ultima Genomics.

Of three valuation methods examined, only Stage-Progression proved applicable. This method applies a 2.5x step-up multiplier typical of seed-to-next-stage progression, yielding an implied valuation of $355M from the $142M capital raised baseline. Peer-Median analysis could not be applied due to insufficient narrow-stage comparables within the Biotech & Health sector—while 16 same-sector peers exist, filtering for same-stage or adjacent-stage companies with similar valuation tiers yielded fewer than the required three datapoints. Public-Comp Anchoring, though the sector median P/S stands at 7.4x across the three public tickers, cannot be deployed without revenue disclosure, which private companies rarely provide.

The triangulated valuation range is $302M–$408M, centered at $355M. However, this estimate rests on a single applicable methodology and lacks corroboration from peer multiples or public market anchors. Key uncertainties include EvolutionaryScale's actual revenue run rate, the appropriateness of a 2.5x multiplier for this specific company's risk profile, and broader biotech market conditions. Additional disclosure or comparable data would significantly strengthen confidence in this range.
